name: M4A1消音版 | 赤红新星
descriptionEn: With a smaller magazine than its unmuffled counterpart, the silenced M4A1 provides quieter shots with less recoil and better accuracy. It has been painted with a chrome base coat and candied in transparent red anodized effect paint. Automatic. Systematic. Hydromatic.
descriptionZh: 消音版 M4A1 相对于它那没有消音器的同行来说弹匣更小，枪声也较为“沉默”，还拥有更小的后坐力和更高的精准度。 这把武器使用铬外表，通过半透明的红色电镀处理进行了涂装。 自动液压传动系统
